2603.28253.title: MR-ImagenTime: Multi-Resolution Time Series Generation through Dual Image Representations
2603.28253.paper_summary: Time series forecasting is vital across many domains, yet existing models struggle with fixed-length inputs and inadequate multi-scale modeling. We propose MR-CDM, a framework combining hierarchical multi-resolution trend decomposition, an adaptive embedding mechanism for variable-length inputs, and a multi-scale conditional diffusion process. Evaluations on four real-world datasets demonstrate that MR-CDM significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines (e.g., CSDI, Informer), reducing MAE and RMSE by approximately 6-10 to a certain degree.
2603.28253.paper_summary_zh: 時間序列預測在許多領域中至關重要，但現有模型在固定長度輸入和不足的多尺度建模方面面臨挑戰。我們提出了MR-CDM，這是一個結合了分層多解析度趨勢分解、適應性嵌入機制以處理可變長度輸入，以及多尺度條件擴散過程的框架。在四個真實世界數據集上的評估顯示，MR-CDM顯著超越了最先進的基準（例如，CSDI、Informer），在一定程度上將MAE和RMSE降低了約6-10。
2603.28253.author: Xianyong Xu et.al.
2603.28253.authors: Xianyong Xu, Yuanjun Zuo, Zhihong Huang, Yihan Qin, Haoxian Xu, Leilei Du, Haotian Wang
